en.commentary: This is the category I lean on hardest in July, and after a summer of hauling sticks to the gym, on trails and into a car that hits 40C by noon, my order is settled. LMNT takes the top spot because its 1,000mg sodium per stick is the number that actually matters when you are sweating through a shirt, and the zero-sugar, dye-free formula means I can drink four a day without a gut ache or a crash. It costs more per serving, and it earns it. Liquid I.V. lands second as the smartest everyday pick: its WHO-based oral rehydration ratio genuinely pulls water into you faster than plain water, and the new allulose sugar-free version finally fixes my one complaint. Sports Research Hydrate is the value story of 2026, a clean 2:1 sodium-to-potassium formula that carries Informed Sport testing at a price the boutique brands cannot match. Nuun Sport stays essential for portability, a tablet you drop in any bottle with only 1g of sugar. The bottom of this list is still strong. My honest advice: match the mix to the sweat. Heavy heat and long efforts want LMNT or Re-Lyte, daily desk hydration wants Ultima or Cure.

highlights.title: LMNT wins because 1,000mg of sodium is the whole point
highlights.body: When you sweat hard in real heat, sodium is the electrolyte you lose most and need back fastest. LMNT delivers 1,000mg per stick, more than triple what most competitors offer, with zero sugar and no artificial dyes to get in the way. I have run through 40C afternoons on LMNT and stayed sharp, where lighter mixes left me with a headache by hour three. It is the mix I hand to anyone doing physical work in summer.

highlights.title: Liquid I.V. is the everyday hydrator with the best science
highlights.body: Liquid I.V. is built on the World Health Organization oral rehydration framework, using sodium and glucose co-transport to move water across the gut wall faster than water alone. That mechanism is real and clinically grounded. The new allulose sugar-free line keeps the absorption benefit while cutting the 11g of sugar that used to hold it back, which is why it jumps to my number two for daily drinking.

highlights.title: Sports Research Hydrate is the value champion of 2026
highlights.body: A clean 400mg sodium to 200mg potassium ratio, sugar-free, loaded with 65 trace minerals and coconut water, and Informed Sport certified for banned substances. At $22.95 for 16 packets it undercuts every boutique competitor while carrying the testing credential athletes actually need. If you want most of what LMNT offers for less money, this is where I would start.

highlights.title: Match the sodium to your sweat, not the hype
highlights.body: The single biggest mistake I see is people buying maximum-sodium mixes for a desk day, then feeling bloated and salty. If you sweat heavily or train long in heat, reach for LMNT or Re-Lyte. If you want gentle daily minerals at your desk, Ultima and Cure deliver potassium and magnesium with almost no sodium load. The right pick depends entirely on how much salt you are actually losing.

highlights.title: Subscriptions are where the real value lives
highlights.body: Every top brand here rewards a subscription, and the discount is large enough to change the ranking on cost. LMNT drops from $1.50 to under $1.00 per stick on its bundle plans, and Sports Research and Ultima both cut meaningfully with recurring delivery. If you drink electrolytes daily through summer, set up a subscription and pause it in winter. That single move makes the premium picks genuinely affordable.

zh-tw.commentary: 老實說，這個品類是我七月最依賴的東西。整個夏天我把補水粉帶去健身房、帶上步道、丟進中午就飆到快 40 度的車裡，喝到現在名次我已經很篤定。LMNT 穩坐第一，因為它每包 1,000 毫克鈉，這個數字在你整件衣服都濕透的時候才是真的有用，而且零糖無色素，我一天喝四包也不會脹氣或血糖崩。每份是貴一點，但它撐得起這個價。Liquid I.V. 排第二，是最聰明的日常選擇，它用 WHO 口服補液比例，真的把水拉進身體的速度比白開水快，新的阿洛酮糖無糖版更是把我唯一的抱怨補起來了。Sports Research Hydrate 是 2026 的性價比故事，乾淨的 2:1 鈉鉀比還過了 Informed Sport 檢驗，價格卻壓在精品品牌打不到的位置。Nuun Sport 靠隨身性穩住第四，一顆發泡錠丟進任何水瓶只有 1 克糖。講白了我的建議就一句，看你流多少汗選粉。大熱天跟長時間運動就上 LMNT 或 Re-Lyte，坐辦公室日常補水挑 Ultima 或 Cure 就夠。

highlights.title: LMNT 贏在 1,000 毫克鈉，這才是重點
highlights.body: 真的在熱天狂流汗時，鈉是你流失最多、最需要補回來的電解質。LMNT 每包給你 1,000 毫克，是多數對手的三倍以上，還零糖無人工色素，喝起來沒有雜味。我在快 40 度的午後靠 LMNT 撐過整場，腦袋還是清楚的，換成鈉含量低的粉，第三小時就開始頭痛。夏天要做粗重工作或戶外活動，我就是遞這款給人。

highlights.title: Liquid I.V. 是科學最扎實的日常補水款
highlights.body: Liquid I.V. 建立在世界衛生組織的口服補液框架上，用鈉與葡萄糖的協同運輸把水推過腸壁，吸收速度贏過純水。這個機制是有臨床根據的真材實料。新的阿洛酮糖無糖版保留了吸收優勢，又砍掉過去 11 克糖那個扣分點，所以它在我心中日常喝的排名直接跳到第二。

highlights.title: Sports Research Hydrate 是 2026 的性價比冠軍
highlights.body: 乾淨的 400 毫克鈉配 200 毫克鉀比例，無糖，塞了 65 種微量礦物質跟椰子水，還通過 Informed Sport 禁藥檢驗。16 包 22.95 美元的價格打趴每一個精品對手，還帶著運動員真正需要的檢驗認證。想用更少的錢拿到接近 LMNT 的東西，我會從這款開始試。

highlights.title: 看流汗量選鈉含量，別跟著行銷走
highlights.body: 我看過最常見的錯誤，就是坐辦公室的人買最高鈉的粉，結果喝到又脹又鹹。你如果流汗量大或在熱天長時間訓練，就拿 LMNT 或 Re-Lyte。你如果只是想在辦公桌補點礦物質，Ultima 跟 Cure 提供鉀跟鎂又幾乎沒有鈉負擔。選哪款完全看你實際流失多少鹽分。

highlights.title: 訂閱制才是真正省錢的地方
highlights.body: 這裡每個頂尖品牌都給訂閱優惠，而且折扣大到會改變成本排名。LMNT 走組合訂閱方案能從每包 1.5 美元壓到 1 美元以下，Sports Research 跟 Ultima 定期配送也都省得有感。你如果整個夏天每天喝電解質，就設個訂閱，冬天再暫停。光這一招就讓那些高價款變得真的付得起。

en.commentary: LMNT keeps the top spot this week, and the reason is the same one that put it there: 1,000 mg of sodium per stick, the highest load of anything I have tested and roughly double the next option. If you sweat through long training days or work outdoors in July heat, that number is the whole point, and the clean label with zero sugar backs it up. The news this week is that LMNT now sells a sparkling ready-to-drink can alongside the original packets, which is a genuinely useful move for people who want hydration without carrying a shaker. It does not change the ranking because the powder is still where the value lives. Liquid IV holds second because its glucose-sodium-potassium blend is built on the WHO oral rehydration framework and it absorbs fast, plus the sugar-free version tastes as good as anything in this group. Sports Research stays third on the strength of its third-party testing and a price that beats both leaders per serving. The one name to watch is Freaks of Nature, a newer mix that matches LMNT on zero added sugar while covering all five key electrolytes. It is not in this list yet, but if the clinical backing holds up it will push into the top five soon. For now the order reflects what actually performs in a bottle: sodium for heavy sweaters, absorption science for everyday users, and testing plus value for anyone buying by the tub.

highlights.title: LMNT earns its lead on sodium
highlights.body: At 1,000 mg of sodium per serving, LMNT carries the heaviest electrolyte load here and pairs it with a zero-sugar, clean label. For heavy sweaters and long sessions that number is the whole reason to buy.

highlights.title: New sparkling can, same powder value
highlights.body: LMNT added a sparkling ready-to-drink can this month for grab-and-go hydration. It is a nice option, though the stick packs still deliver the best cost per serving, so the ranking holds.

highlights.title: Liquid IV wins on absorption science
highlights.body: Liquid IV builds on the WHO oral rehydration formula with a glucose-sodium-potassium blend that pulls water in fast. The sugar-free version tastes excellent, which keeps it comfortably in second.

highlights.title: Sports Research is the value and testing pick
highlights.body: Third-party tested and cheaper per serving than either leader, Sports Research Hydrate is the tub I recommend to anyone buying in bulk who still wants a clean, verified product.

highlights.title: Freaks of Nature is the one to watch
highlights.body: A newer mix matching LMNT on zero added sugar while covering all five key electrolytes. Not ranked here yet, but the clinical backing could move it into the top tier soon.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 LMNT 還是穩坐第一，理由跟一開始把它推上去的一樣：每包 1,000 毫克鈉，是我測過所有產品裡最高的，大概是第二名的兩倍。你如果是那種練一整天狂流汗，或是七月大熱天在戶外工作的人，這個數字就是重點，而且無糖乾淨配方也撐得住。這週的新聞是 LMNT 推出氣泡即飲罐裝版，跟原本的隨身包並行賣，對懶得帶搖搖杯又想補水的人來說真的實用。不過這沒改變排名，因為粉包還是最划算的選擇。Liquid IV 守住第二，它的葡萄糖加鈉加鉀配方是照 WHO 口服補液架構做的，吸收很快，而且無糖版的味道在這群裡數一數二。Sports Research 排第三，靠的是第三方檢驗跟每份算下來比前兩名都便宜的價格。要注意的一個名字是 Freaks of Nature，這款比較新的產品在零添加糖上跟 LMNT 打平，還一次補齊五種關鍵電解質。它還沒進榜，但臨床背書如果站得住，很快就會擠進前五。目前這個順序反映的就是實際泡出來的表現：狂流汗的人看鈉含量，日常補水看吸收科學，整桶買的人看檢驗跟價格。

highlights.title: LMNT 靠鈉含量坐穩龍頭
highlights.body: 每份 1,000 毫克鈉，是這裡電解質含量最猛的，還配上零糖乾淨配方。對狂流汗跟長時間運動的人來說，這個數字就是買它的全部理由。

highlights.title: 新出氣泡罐裝，粉包還是最划算
highlights.body: LMNT 這個月加了氣泡即飲罐裝版，隨手拿了就能補水，選擇多了很好。不過隨身粉包每份成本還是最低，所以排名不動。

highlights.title: Liquid IV 贏在吸收科學
highlights.body: Liquid IV 用 WHO 口服補液配方為底，葡萄糖加鈉加鉀讓水分吸得快。無糖版味道很棒，穩穩守在第二名。

highlights.title: Sports Research 是划算又有檢驗的選擇
highlights.body: 有第三方檢驗，每份還比前兩名便宜，Sports Research Hydrate 是我推薦給整桶買、又想要乾淨有背書產品的人的首選。

highlights.title: Freaks of Nature 是要盯的黑馬
highlights.body: 比較新的產品，零添加糖上跟 LMNT 打平，還一次補齊五種關鍵電解質。目前還沒進榜，但臨床背書可能很快把它推進前段班。
